Name: Coordinator_Name
Description: The unique identifying coordinator name used to identify the different coordinators in reports.

Name: Node_ID_To_Coordinator_Event_List
Description: The list of Node ID & Coordinator Event pairs to find the first node id that has the given **NodeProperty**.

Name: Node_Property_Key_Value_To_Have
Description: The **NodeProperty** key:value pair that the node must have to get its event broadcasted.

Name: Not_Found_Coordinator_Event
Description: Coordinator event to broadcast when a node with the given **NodeProperty** key:value pair is not found. The events contained in the list are defined in **Custom_Coordinator_Events** in the simulation configuration file.

Name: Start_Trigger_Condition_List
Description: If one of the coordinator events in this list is heard, the coordinator will start and attempt to send an event based on the selection of a node. The events contained in the list are defined in **Custom_Coordinator_Events** in the simulation configuration file.
